message:
fix(ci): remove excess indentation from GitHub issue template

The template literal in checksum-monitor.yml had 12 leading spaces on
each line that would appear verbatim in the created GitHub issues,
making them look oddly formatted.

Fixed by removing the indentation inside the template literal while
keeping the surrounding JavaScript code properly indented.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
